content.problemStatement:
Identify and rectify the errors in the code provided to get the desired output.


Output Format
Coding Chef

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program does not read any input. It directly prints the required phrase "Coding Chef".

solution.approach: The task is to output a fixed literal string. No computation or input handling is required. For consistency with platform expectations, we define a dummy test case count T=1 and loop once, printing the required phrase. This ensures the program follows the generic pattern of handling multiple test cases while still producing the correct single output.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – constant time as the program performs a fixed number of operations regardless of input.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few scalar variables are used.
